name: prinner-descent
description: The melodic skeleton of the Prinner riposte's upper voice (Gjerdingen): scale degrees 6-5-4-3, stepwise descent. Degree-relative and rhythm-free, so it matches in any key at any pacing. HONEST SCOPE: the full galant Prinner is a two-voice schema (this descent over a 4-3-2-1 bass); the two-voice pairing needs the cross-voice pattern scope - a recorded gap-C follow-on, not expressible in the melody domain.
